claims.detail: Simulator cost claim: migration waves sequenced by savings potential and dependency risk.

findings.description: Rightsizing drops annual compute estimate by consolidating burstable VMs after measured utilization windows.
findings.recommendation: Pair rightsizing with automated shutdown schedules for non-production tiers.

findings.description: Reserved instances cover baseline SQL DTU once 30-day peak variance stays within a narrow band.
findings.recommendation: Revisit reservation coverage quarterly when workload shifts to serverless tiers.
